tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• AG Kripal Singh was an Indian cricketer from Chennai who played as an all-rounder.
  • He represented India during the 1950s in Test cricket.
  • He was known for his off-spin bowling and useful lower-order batting.
  • He played domestic cricket for Tamil Nadu.
  • Kripal contributed steadily in both batting and bowling roles.
  • He was part of India's early post-independence cricket era.
  • He played in a time when Indian cricket was still developing internationally.
  • After retirement, he remained associated with cricket circles.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Represented India in Test cricket.
  • Key all-round contributor in domestic cricket.
  • Played important matches during early Indian cricket era.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• One of the few early Indian players to contribute in both batting and bowling roles.
  • Played during a foundational phase of Indian international cricket.

tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• AG Milkha Singh was an aggressive Indian batsman from Chennai.
  • He played for India in the late 1970s.
  • He was known for his attacking batting approach.
  • He performed strongly in domestic cricket for Tamil Nadu.
  • His style of play was fearless and entertaining.
  • He earned recognition for scoring quickly.
  • Despite a short international career, he left an impression.
  • He continued contributing to cricket after retirement.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Represented India in Test cricket.
  • Strong performer in domestic cricket.
  • Known for aggressive batting style.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Nicknamed for his attacking style similar to aggressive batters of his era.
  • Was among the early Indian batsmen known for fearless stroke play.

tab1.title: Biography

  • He is also active on digital platforms and YouTube.
  • He is respected for his cricket knowledge and insights.

tab2.content:

  • Successful domestic cricket career.
  • Became a leading cricket commentator.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:

  • Known for creative Hindi-English commentary style.

tab3.title: Facts
